description_long: This object is a compact, submachine gun-style firearm with a matte black finish and distinctive decorative elements. The receiver and grip are adorned with a stylized, wrapped bandage motif in tan and brown, and there are pinkish-red cloud-like graphics on the main body. The barrel is short and copper-colored, with a simple cylindrical muzzle. The weapon features a folding wire stock, a prominent magazine extending below the grip, and a side-mounted charging handle. The trigger guard is rounded and robust, and the overall design is utilitarian with artistic embellishments.
description: A compact, black submachine gun with tan bandage motifs, pinkish-red cloud graphics, and a copper barrel, featuring a folding wire stock and extended magazine.
description_view_0: Front view showing the copper barrel muzzle, rounded trigger guard, and the top sight aligned with the receiver.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the pinkish-red cloud graphic, tan bandage motif on the grip, and the folding wire stock.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the receiver, the wire stock, and the magazine protruding downward.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the continuation of the bandage motif, the copper barrel, and the side-mounted charging handle.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short length, no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized, robust with no finger grooves or reinforcement
